name: BuildInput error: required common field missing at runtime
description: When an operator declares a strict common_input field but the upstream pipeline never produces it, BuildInput must raise an ExecutionError. This fixture locks the full error message format including the wrapping prefix, catching any operator-name duplication.

expected_error.message_contains: required field "missing_field" is missing in common
expected_error.wrapping_exact: pine: execution error in operator "lua_needs_field": required field "missing_field" is missing in common
